summary: WebRTC Live Stream APIs and backend refactor testing complete. All 31 backend tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with Live Streams, Reels, Posts, Stories sections working.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 404 - connection closes before established. Non-blocking for app functionality.

issues: HTML nesting warning: button within button in Follow button area. Non-blocking but should be fixed for proper HTML semantics.

passed_tests: WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams - Create stream returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: GET /api/streams - List live streams returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: GET /api/streams/{id} - Get stream details returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/chat - Send chat (message field) returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/react - Heart reaction returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/react - Fire reaction returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/react - Clap reaction returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/react - Laugh reaction returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/react - Wow reaction returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/react - Invalid reaction returns 400
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/signal - WebRTC signaling works
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/gift - Send gift returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/join - Join stream returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/leave - Leave stream returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: POST /api/streams/{id}/end - End stream returns 200
WebRTC Stream API: DELETE /api/streams/{id} - Delete stream returns 200
Modular Livestream API: GET /api/livestream/active - Returns 200
Modular Livestream API: POST /api/livestream/start - Creates stream returns 200
Modular Livestream API: GET /api/livestream/{id} - Returns stream details
Modular Livestream API: POST /api/livestream/{id}/chat - Chat works
Modular Livestream API: POST /api/livestream/{id}/end - Ends stream
Auth API: POST /api/auth/login - Returns 200 with token
Auth API: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user info
Reels API: GET /api/reels - Returns 200 with reels list
Reels API: Unauthorized access returns 401
Posts API: GET /api/posts - Returns 200
Posts API: GET /api/feed/home - Returns feed with live_streams, stories, posts
Stream Error Cases: Non-existent stream returns 404
Stream Error Cases: Chat to ended stream returns 404
Stream Error Cases: Unauthorized access returns 401
Frontend: Login flow works with test credentials
Frontend: Home page loads with Live Now, Stories, Reels, Featured Posts sections
Frontend: /live page shows live streams list with Go Live button
Frontend: /reels page shows reel player with like/comment/share
Frontend: /settings page loads with all settings sections
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactor completed successfully - modular routes for auth, reels, livestream integrated
WebRTC Live Stream APIs fully functional with all CRUD operations
Stream reactions support 5 types: heart, fire, clap, laugh, wow
WebSocket connection has intermittent 404 errors - may need investigation but doesn't block functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, all key features accessible)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user account testrefactor1@test.com. Test streams created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All WebRTC Live Stream APIs working correctly. Backend refactor verified - modular routes (auth.py, reels.py, livestream.py) integrated with server.py. Test file test_live_stream_apis.py covers: stream CRUD, chat, reactions (5 types), gifts, WebRTC signaling, join/leave flows. WebSocket has intermittent 404s but doesn't affect API functionality.
